era: Krautrock/Indie Rock. E=6 -- heavy, motorik, hypnotic, relentless. Return from degree 110. Sub Pop. v1.49.354.

location.formative: Seattle experimental scene. Krautrock influence. Noise-rock density.

theory_nodes.concept: Krautrock in Seattle -- Can, Neu!, Faust transplanted to PNW noise-rock. Motorik beat as structural principle. Repetition as architecture. Seattle's experimental lineage.
theory_nodes.description: Krautrock in Seattle. Motorik beat. Repetition as architecture.

theory_nodes.concept: Long-form composition -- 8-20+ minute tracks, repetition accumulates intensity through duration, patient stalk then noise-rock eruption. The payoff needs the patience.
theory_nodes.description: Long-form composition. Repetition as architecture. Duration as structure.

cross_references.relationship: Dream pop (E=4) to Krautrock (E=6). Suspension to motorik. +2 energy.
RETURN! 103-degree gap. Same band, same motorik machine.
Both heavy, both Capitol Hill. Krautrock patience (213) to noise rock aggression (214).
